liquidity.what: Combined balance sheets of the Fed, ECB and Bank of Japan, each converted to USD.
liquidity.source: FRED — WALCL (Fed), ECBASSETSW (ECB), JPNASSETS (BOJ); FX via DEXUSEU, DEXJPUS

marketCap.what: Total market value of all US corporate equities (broader than the S&P 500).
marketCap.source: FRED Z.1 — NCBEILQ027S (nonfinancial corporate equities, market value)
